subcodes.first_line: This is the Branch that hath extended from the bower of Thy Oneness... ...Thou knowest, O my God, that I desire for Him naught except that which Thou didst desire
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی هذا غصن انشعب من دوحه فردانیتک و سدره وحدانیتک تراه یا الهی ناظرا
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant
